title: triceras oxyceras
intro: Triceras oxyceras is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Triceras oxyceras include its use in treating fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, and it is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to be used in herbal remedies.
